segments.text: Just look at Lion's forward smash usage and stuff...
segments.original_text: ライオン利用して横スマとか見てて分かる通り

segments.text: Regarding the counter, it seems like there's nothing to complain about...
segments.original_text: 対策に関してはもう文句ないみたいなところだと思うんで

full_text: Just look at Lion's forward smash usage and stuff... Regarding the counter, it seems like there's nothing to complain about... Both... Oh, here too!
